phrases.intent_en: Ask if sunbed rentals are available
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿tienen alquiler de tumbonas disponible?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, TYEH-nen ahl-KEE-lehr deh toom-BOH-nahs dee-poh-nee-BLEH?

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, there are free sunbeds now.

responses.english: Yes, there are free sunbeds now.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if beach service to sunbeds is offered
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿hay servicio de camarero en la arena?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, AH-ee ser-BEE-syoh deh kah-mah-REH-roh en lah AH-reh-nah?

likely_response.local: Sí, en las hamacas de primera
likely_response.pronunciation: SÍ EHN LAHS ah-MAH-kahs DEH pree-MEH-rah
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, they come to your sunbed.

responses.english: Yes, they come to your sunbed.
responses.phonetic: SÍ EHN LAHS ah-MAH-kahs DEH pree-MEH-rah
responses.french: Sí, en las hamacas de primera

phrases.intent_en: Ask where fresh seafood is listed
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde veo el pescado fresco del día?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DOHN-deh VEH-oh el pes-KAH-doh FRES-koh del DEE-ah?

likely_response.local: En la pizarra junto a la barra.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH pee-THAHR-rah HOON-toh AH LAH BAHR-rah
likely_response.translation_en: On the board next to the bar.

responses.english: On the board next to the bar.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH pee-THAHR-rah HOON-toh AH LAH BAHR-rah
responses.french: En la pizarra junto a la barra.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to order at the chiringuito
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde se hace el pedido?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh seh AH-seh el peh-DEE-doh?

likely_response.local: En la barra central, al fondo.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH BAHR-rah thehnt-RAHL AHL FOHN-doh
likely_response.translation_en: At the central bar, at the back.

responses.english: At the central bar, at the back.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH BAHR-rah thehnt-RAHL AHL FOHN-doh
responses.french: En la barra central, al fondo.
